raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rihta Narumâ / ar pa-
fchu Gaifnu / zehlahs tas Keh-
ninsch/ un gabje drihs pee to Lau-
wu Bedres.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tad wiꞥſch pee Bed-
res nahze / tauze wiꞥſch Dani-
jelu ar noskummunschu Balsi:
Las Kehninsch atbildeja un faz-
zija us Danijelu : Danijel / tu
dsihwa Deewa Kalps/irrag/taws
Deews/ ko tu bes Mittetchanas
gohdi / tew warrejs no teem
Lauwahn ispestiht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Danijels us
to Kehnizu : Lai tas Kehninsch
mubscham dsihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mans Deews irr fatwu
Engeli fuhtijs/ tas irr to Lau-
wu Rihtli asturrejs/ka tee mann
ne irr eewainojſchi / tapehz ka
wiꞥſu Breekſcha es nenoseedsigs
eſmu atrasts / ir pretti tew
Kungs Kehninsch es ne eſmu ne-
to tauna darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad lihgsmojahs tas Keh-
ninsch pee fewis/ un pawehleja/
ka tij Danijelu no Bedres ts-
wilkt/ un kad Danijels no Be-
dres uswilkts tappe/ tad ne tap-
pe ne kahdas Wainas pee winna
atrastas/ tapehz ka wiꞥſch bij
fawain Deewam ustizzejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl pawehleja tas Keh-
ninsch/ ka bij tohs Wihrus at-
west/ kas Danijelu bij apsuu-
Dsejschi/ un tee mette tohs Lau-
wu Bedre lihds ar winnu Behr-
neem un Seewahm/un tee wehl
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ne nahze Dibbina/ tad jaw
Lauwas tohs sagrabbe/ un fat
ze wiſans winnu Kaulus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad rakstija tas Kehni-
Darju8 us wiﬀeem Laudi
Tautahm un Wallo dahm:
Deews jums dohd dauds Me
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No mannim tehyp pan
lehys/ ka wiſas mannas W
stibas Teejäs buhs drebbeht
trihzeht preekſch Danijela
wu / jo wiꞥſch irr tas d
wajs Deews/ un pastahn
mubschigi / un winna Wal
ne irr nibziga/ un winna W
ditchanat ne irr Gals.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch atpesti un
glahbj/ un darra Brithnu
un Sihmes Debbefis un S
mes Wirfu/ tas irr Danijel
Lauwu Bedres ispestijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas pats Dan
kna warrens eckſch Dar
Walstibas/ un eekſch Koref
Perseru Kehnizu Walstibas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
